title: Ravana Mavan da Lyrics In Tamil & English Meaning | Jana Nayagan | Vijay

sections.intro: Feel the raw power of Raavana Mavan Daa, a high-octane track composed by Anirudh Ravichander for the movie Vettaiyan. This song perfectly captures a 'mass' persona with its thumping beats and aggressive lyrical flow. Dive into the deep meanings behind these fierce Tamil verses.
sections.easterEgg:
Hidden Details You Missed! 🕵️‍♂️

  • The 'Ravana' imagery is a recurring motif in director T.J. Gnanavel’s character building for the protagonist, symbolizing a complex hero with grey shades.
  • Anirudh uses a heavy 'Tribal Bass' influence in the percussion to denote the raw, unbridled power of the character portrayed by Rajinikanth.
  • The lyric 'Othayil nikkira yeman' (The lone God of Death) refers to the climax sequence where the hero faces the odds entirely by himself.
sections.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the significance of 'Ravana mavan'?

It translates to 'Son of Ravana,' used metaphorically to describe someone with immense power, ego, and defiance against traditional norms.

Who wrote the lyrics for Raavana Mavan Daa?

The lyrics were penned by Super Subu, known for his high-energy and 'mass' appeal verses in Anirudh's compositions.

உலகாண்டவன்டா

குத்திரு ரத்தமும் வருண்டா
குத்துற கொம்பனும் எவன்டா
ஒளி போன்றவன்டா

சரிஞ்சுதான் நடக்குறா
நலமெல்லாம் முறுக்கலா ஏறும்
உனக்குத்தான் தலைவிதி
அடிச்சதும் கிறுக்கலா மாறும்

போர் குணம் இருக்கா

அவன சீண்டுற கிறுக்கா

யாருன்னு கண்டதும் பொறுப்பா

வசனமா எழுதலா
அவன்தான் அதுக்கெல்லாம் மேல
எதிரியா அனுப்புனா
சிரிக்கிறான் பழகிட்டான் போல

englishStanzas:
Ravana mavan da
Othayil nikkira yeman da
Athana pimbamum avan da
Ulagaandavan da

[He is the son of Ravana, the God of Death standing alone. Every reflection is him; he is the one who ruled the world.]

Vaa vandhu thodudaa
Kuthiru rathamum varunda
Kuthura kombanum evan da
Oli pondravan da

[Come and try to touch him! The chariot of spears is arriving. Who is the mighty one to strike him? He is like the light.]

Sarinjudhaan nadakkuraa
Nalamellaam murukkalaa yerum
Unakkuthaan thalaividhi
Adichadhum kirukkalaa maarum

[He walks with a slight lean, and his strength rises with pride. Your destiny is in his hands; once he strikes, it all becomes a blur.]

Por gunam irukka
Sigaram kandavan serukka
Avana seendura kirukka
Mogam veengirukka

[With a warrior's spirit and the pride of one who reached the peak—hey you madman trying to provoke him, is your ego swollen?]

Naayaga neruppaa
Thottavan kaiyila karuppaa
Yaarunnu kandadhum poruppaa
Asayaadhiruppaan

[The hero is like fire; whoever touches him gets burnt (charred). Once they realize who he is, they stay still out of respect and responsibility.]

Vasanamaa ezhudhalaa
Avan dhaan adhukkellaam mela
Edhiriyaa anuppunaa
Sirikkiraan pazhagittaan pola

[He isn't defined by written dialogues; he is above all that. If you send an enemy, he just laughs—it seems he’s quite used to it.]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ravana Mavan da'?

The song reflects themes of energy and celebration, capturing the essence of the character's spirit in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Jana Nayagan'?

The movie revolves around a heroic character who faces challenges and fights for justice, making the song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who is the singer and lyricist of this song?

The song is sung by Anirudh and the lyrics are penned by Vivek.

When was 'Ravana Mavan da' released?

The song was released on January 3, 2026.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ravana Mavan da, Anirudh delivers an electrifying performance that captures the essence of celebration and joy. The song plays a pivotal role in Jana Nayagan, highlighting the protagonist's vibrant personality and zest for life. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it evokes feelings of excitement and energy, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. The track not only entertains but also enhances the film's narrative, resonating with audiences looking for a fun and upbeat experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ravana Mavan da is a high-energy track that showcases Anirudh's dynamic vocals paired with the vibrant lyrics by Vivek. This song from the upcoming film Jana Nayagan promises to get you on your feet and dancing. With its infectious beats and lively spirit, it's set to be a party anthem of 2026!
stanzaMeanings: Ravana's son is standing tall, he is the one who rules the world.
Come, let's start, the horse chariot is coming, he is the one who brings the light.
He walks with confidence, everything is in order, your fate will change, it will be unpredictable.
Ravana's son is standing tall, he is the one who rules the world.
Come, let's start, he is the one with the horse's horn.
He has good qualities, he is the one who reaches the peak, he is mischievous and carefree.
He is like a fiery leader, holding something dark in his hand, whoever sees him has a duty, he is always ready.
He writes like a poet, he is above all of that, if he sends a challenge, he smiles as if he has won.
Ravana's son is standing tall, he is the one who rules the world.
Come, let's start, he is the one with the horse's horn.
Ravana's son is standing tall, he is the one who rules the world, he is the one who brings the light.
Come, let's start, the horse chariot is coming, he is the one who brings the light.
